channel.title: Certification on Elkana Lang'at
channel.description: Recent content in Certification on Elkana Lang'at

item.title: Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals (SC-900)
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Microsoft certification validating foundational knowledge of security, compliance, and identity concepts across Microsoft cloud services.

item.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: AWS certification validating foundational knowledge of AWS Cloud services, security, architecture, and pricing.

item.title: Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Microsoft certification demonstrating foundational knowledge of core data concepts and Azure data services.

item.title: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Microsoft certification demonstrating foundational knowledge of Azure cloud services, core solutions, and management tools.
